1860580.name: Epic War Collection
1860580.description:
A classic series of strategy Flash games, re-implemented on a new engine and revitalized with thorough balancing, purposeful level design, and exclusive content.

Epic War 1

  • Take command in a dying world and build up your defenses while sending tactical waves of troops to overpower your enemy.

  • Old school artstyle. Resource management. Deceptively simple.

Epic War 2

  • Build a massive army in battle and gain the upper hand by learning how to use each unit to its full potential.

  • Quick escalation. Story-rich. Faction warfare.

Epic War 3

  • Play as one of 6 generals, tactically position your army and support it with magic to defeat your adversaries in a territorial war.

  • Dynamic. Chaotic. Simple.

Epic War 4

  • Assemble a team of heroes, recruit diverse creatures, and halt world-ending threats through cunning and creativity.

  • Nuanced. Strategy. Problem-solving.

Epic War 5

  • Embark on a journey to defy calamity. Fight your way across hostile territory, strategically upgrade and gear up your ever-growing army.

  • Adventurous. Vibrant. Party growth.

Key Features

  • 5 games

  • 100+ stages

  • 125+ units available to use

  • 40+ spells available to use

  • Up to 60 FPS

  • Re-imagined experience with brand new content

  • Varying combat styles and areas of focus from game to game

  • Cloud saves

  • Goblins
